basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on 14 May 2026 on the official website of IIT Roorkee. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E./ M.Tech./ M.S. and B.E./B.Tech in Geospatial Engineering / Geoinformatics/ Remote Sensing & GIS/ Computer Science/Data Science/ Electrical Engineering / Electrical & Electronics Engineering or related disciplines with CGPA above 6.5 (on 10.0 scale) or percentage greater than 65% aggregate with GATE Score card
qualification.details: M.E./ M.Tech./ M.S. and B.E./B.Tech in Geospatial Engineering / Geoinformatics/ Remote Sensing & GIS/ Computer Science/Data Science/ Electrical Engineering / Electrical & Electronics Engineering or related disciplines with CGPA above 6.5 (on 10.0 scale) or percentage greater than 65% aggregate with GATE Score card.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Roorkee to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
